description: A minimal HTML5 2D game starter using Phaser 3 with a basic scene and player

files.README.md:
# {{project_name}}

{{description}}

## Features
- Phaser 3 game engine
- Arcade physics
- Keyboard controls
- Scene management
- Procedural textures (no assets needed)

## Controls
- Left/Right Arrows: Move
- Up Arrow or Space: Jump

## Running

### Install dependencies
```bash
npm install
```

### Start development server
```bash
npm run dev
```

Then open http://localhost:3000 in your browser.

## Project Structure
```
├── index.html          # Entry point
├── package.json        # Dependencies
└── src/
    ├── main.js         # Game configuration
    ├── scenes/
    │   ├── BootScene.js    # Asset loading
    │   └── GameScene.js    # Main game scene
    └── entities/
        └── Player.js       # Player class
```

## Extension Points

### Add Enemy
Create `src/entities/Enemy.js` with patrol behavior.

### Add Collectibles
Add coins that increase score when touched.

### Add Levels
Create additional scenes for level progression.

### Add Animations
Replace colored rectangles with sprite sheets.
